option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-padding:20;" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1">
<Label text="Attendance" style="-fx-font-size:20;" />
<TableView> <columns> <TableColumn text="Date" /> <TableColumn text="Student" /> <TableColumn text="Status" /> </columns> </TableView>
</VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-padding:20;" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Lecturer.AttendanceController">
<Label text="Attendance" style="-fx-font-size:20;" />
<TableView> <columns> <TableColumn text="Date" /> <TableColumn text="Student" /> <TableColumn text="Status" /> </columns> </TableView>
</VBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<VBox spacing="15" style="-fx-padding:20;" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1">
<Label text="Dashboard" style="-fx-font-size:22;" />
<HBox spacing="15">
<VBox style="-fx-background-color:#3498db; -fx-padding:15;"> <Label text="Courses"/> <Label text="3"/> </VBox>
<VBox style="-fx-background-color:#2ecc71; -fx-padding:15;"> <Label text="Students"/> <Label text="78"/> </VBox>
<VBox style="-fx-background-color:#f39c12; -fx-padding:15;"> <Label text="Notices"/> <Label text="5"/> </VBox>
</HBox>
</VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color:#f5f7fa;" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Lecturer.DashboardController">
<content> <VBox spacing="20" style="-fx-padding:25; -fx-background-color:#f5f7fa;">
<Label text="Dashboard" style="-fx-font-size:28px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0b1f36;" />
<!-- Stats Cards --> <HBox spacing="20">
<!-- Courses Card --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color:white; -fx-padding:20; -fx-background-radius:8; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:8;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text=" My Courses" style="-fx-font-size:16px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0b1f36;"/> <Label fx:id="courseCountLabel" text="0" style="-fx-font-size:32px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#3498db;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Students Card --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color:white; -fx-padding:20; -fx-background-radius:8; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:8;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text=" Total Students" style="-fx-font-size:16px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0b1f36;"/> <Label fx:id="studentCountLabel" text="0" style="-fx-font-size:32px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#2ecc71;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Notices Card --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color:white; -fx-padding:20; -fx-background-radius:8; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:8;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text=" Notices" style="-fx-font-size:16px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0b1f36;"/> <Label fx:id="noticeCountLabel" text="0" style="-fx-font-size:32px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#f39c12;"/> </children> </VBox>
</HBox>
<!-- Info Section --> <VBox spacing="10" style="-fx-background-color:white; -fx-padding:20; -fx-background-radius:8; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:8;"> <children> <Label text="Quick Information" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0b1f36;"/> <Label text="Welcome to the Lecturer Dashboard! You can navigate using the menu on the left to:" style="-fx-text-fill:#555; -fx-wrap-text:true;"/> <Label text="• View and manage your courses" style="-fx-text-fill:#555; -fx-wrap-text:true;"/> <Label text="• Upload grades and attendance records" style="-fx-text-fill:#555; -fx-wrap-text:true;"/> <Label text="• View student details and performance" style="-fx-text-fill:#555; -fx-wrap-text:true;"/> <Label text="• Access notices and timetables" style="-fx-text-fill:#555; -fx-wrap-text:true;"/> </children> </VBox>
</VBox> </content>
</ScrollPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="900.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Lecturer.MainController">
<children> <BorderPane prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="900.0">
<!-- LEFT MENU --> <left> <VBox prefWidth="180.0" spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color: #2c3e50; -fx-padding: 10;"> <children>
<Button text="Dashboard" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleDashboard"/>
<Button text="My Courses" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleCourses"/>
<Button text="Materials" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMaterials"/>
<Button text="Upload Marks" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMarks"/>
<Button text="Student Details" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleStudents"/>
<Button text="Attendance" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleAttendance"/>
<Button text="Notices" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleNotices"/>
<Button text="Timetable" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleTimetable"/>
<Button text="My Profile" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleProfile"/>
</children> </VBox> </left>
<!-- TOP HEADER --> <top> <BorderPane style="-fx-background-color: #34495e; -fx-padding: 10;"> <center> <Label text="Lecturer Dashboard" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="20"/> </font> </Label> </center>
<right> <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="10"> <Label text="Welcome, Lecturer" textFill="white"/> <Button text="Logout" style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-text-fill: white;"/> </HBox> </right> </BorderPane> </top>
<!-- CENTER CONTENT --> <center> <StackPane fx:id="contentArea" style="-fx-background-color: #ecf0f1;"/> </center>
</BorderPane> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="1080.0" prefWidth="1920.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Lecturer.MainController" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0.0">
<children> <BorderPane prefHeight="600.0" prefWidth="900.0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0.0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0.0">
<!-- LEFT MENU --> <left> <VBox prefWidth="180.0" spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color: #2c3e50; -fx-padding: 10;"> <children>
<Button text="Dashboard" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleDashboard"/>
<Button text="My Courses" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleCourses"/>
<Button text="Materials" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMaterials"/>
<Button text="Upload Marks" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleMarks"/>
<Button text="Student Details" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleStudents"/>
<Button text="Attendance" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleAttendance"/>
<Button text="Notices" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleNotices"/>
<Button text="Timetable" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleTimetable"/>
<Button text="My Profile" maxWidth="Infinity" prefHeight="40" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: white;" onAction="#handleProfile"/>
</children> </VBox> </left>
<!-- TOP HEADER --> <top> <BorderPane style="-fx-background-color: #34495e; -fx-padding: 10;"> <center> <Label text="Lecturer Dashboard" textFill="white"> <font> <Font size="20"/> </font> </Label> </center>
<right> <HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="10"> <Label text="Welcome, Lecturer" textFill="white"/> <Button text="Logout" style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-text-fill: white;"/> </HBox> </right> </BorderPane> </top>
<!-- CENTER CONTENT --> <center> <StackPane fx:id="contentArea" style="-fx-background-color: #ecf0f1;"/> </center>
</BorderPane> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>
<VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-padding:20;" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1">
<Label text="Notices" style="-fx-font-size:20;" />
<TableView> <columns> <TableColumn text="Title" /> <TableColumn text="Description" /> <TableColumn text="Date" /> </columns> </TableView>
<HBox spacing="10"> <Button text="Add Notice" /> <Button text="Delete Notice" /> </HBox>
</VBox>

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>

<Label text="Student Details" style="-fx-font-size:20;" />
<TableView> <columns> <TableColumn text="Student ID" /> <TableColumn text="Name" /> <TableColumn text="Email" /> <TableColumn text="Attendance %" /> </columns> </TableView>

</VBox>

option.value:

<?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?>

</VBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import com.gluonhq.charm.glisten.control.ProgressBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Text?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="534.0" prefWidth="699.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="CONTROLLER_NAME"> <children> <Text fill="#0b1f36" layoutX="14.0" layoutY="45.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Attendance" wrappingWidth="339.541748046875"> <font> <Font size="29.0" /> </font> </Text> <Text layoutX="25.0" layoutY="87.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Select subject:-" wrappingWidth="100.65747833251953"> <font> <Font size="14.0" /> </font> </Text> <ComboBox layoutX="119.0" layoutY="70.0" prefWidth="150.0" promptText="All subjects" /> <ToggleButton layoutX="299.0" layoutY="70.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="40.0" text="All" /> <ToggleButton layoutX="350.0" layoutY="70.0" mnemonicParsing="false" text="Theory" /> <ToggleButton layoutX="415.0" layoutY="70.0" mnemonicParsing="false" text="Practical" /> <Button layoutX="514.0" layoutY="71.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="53.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-border-color: black;" text="Filter" textFill="WHITE" /> <TableView layoutX="41.0" layoutY="122.0" prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="481.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="87.20001220703125" text="Course Code" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="85.60003662109375" text="Date" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="73.60003662109375" text="Type" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="76.79998779296875" text="Time" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="80.79998779296875" text="Hours" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="76.79995727539062" text="Status" /> </columns> </TableView> <ProgressBar layoutX="164.0" layoutY="447.0" prefHeight="39.0" prefWidth="350.0" progress="0.0" /> <Text layoutX="41.0" layoutY="364.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Summary of Attendance" wrappingWidth="138.6708984375"> <font> <Font size="13.0" /> </font> </Text> <Label layoutX="211.0" layoutY="384.0" prefHeight="18.0" prefWidth="101.0" text="Total hours" /> <Label layoutX="213.0" layoutY="403.0" text="Participated Hours" /> <Label layoutX="213.0" layoutY="421.0" text="Medical Hours" /> <Label layoutX="554.0" layoutY="458.0" prefHeight="18.0" prefWidth="61.0" text="Eligible" /> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<VBox spacing="0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Student.stuAttendanceController" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;">
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="50" spacing="12" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-padding:10 20 10 20;"> <children> <Label text="Attendance " textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold;" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </children> </HBox>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;"> <content> <VBox spacing="20" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8; -fx-padding:20;"> <children>
<!-- Subject Cards List --> <VBox fx:id="subjectCardBox" spacing="12"/>
<!-- Details Section --> <VBox spacing="15" style="-fx-background-color:white; -fx-background-radius:8; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:8; -fx-padding:20;"> <children>
<Label fx:id="titleLabel" text="Select a subject to view details" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0b1f36;"/>
<HBox spacing="15"> <children> <VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color:#e8f4f8; -fx-background-radius:6; -fx-padding:12;"> <Label text="Attendance" style="-fx-font-size:12px; -fx-text-fill:#555;"/> <Label fx:id="percentageLabel" text="0%" style="-fx-font-size:24px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0b1f36;"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color:#e8f8e8; -fx-background-radius:6; -fx-padding:12;"> <Label text="Present" style="-fx-font-size:12px; -fx-text-fill:#555;"/> <Label fx:id="presentLabel" text="0" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#198754;"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color:#e8f0ff; -fx-background-radius:6; -fx-padding:12;"> <Label text="Medical" style="-fx-font-size:12px; -fx-text-fill:#555;"/> <Label fx:id="medicalLabel" text="0" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#0dcaf0;"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color:#fff0e8; -fx-background-radius:6; -fx-padding:12;"> <Label text="Rejected Medical" style="-fx-font-size:12px; -fx-text-fill:#555;"/> <Label fx:id="rejectedMedicalLabel" text="0" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#fd7e14;"/> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="5" style="-fx-background-color:#ffe8e8; -fx-background-radius:6; -fx-padding:12;"> <Label text="Absent" style="-fx-font-size:12px; -fx-text-fill:#555;"/> <Label fx:id="absentLabel" text="0" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold; -fx-text-fill:#dc3545;"/> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<Label text="Attendance Bar" style="-fx-font-size:14px; -fx-font-weight:bold;"/> <HBox fx:id="barBox" spacing="2" style="-fx-background-color:#f0f0f0; -fx-background-radius:6; -fx-padding:4;"/>
<Label text="Detailed Records" style="-fx-font-size:14px; -fx-font-weight:bold;"/> <TableView fx:id="detailTable" prefHeight="250"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="idCol" prefWidth="100" text="ID"/> <TableColumn fx:id="dateCol" prefWidth="120" text="Date"/> <TableColumn fx:id="sessionCol" prefWidth="150" text="Session"/> <TableColumn fx:id="statusCol" prefWidth="100" text="Status"/> </columns> </TableView>
</children> </VBox>
</children> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane>
</VBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Rectangle2D?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<<<<<<< HEAD <<<<<<< HEAD <AnchorPane prefHeight="785.0" prefWidth="1086.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="MainFormController"> ======= <AnchorPane prefHeight="700.0" prefWidth="1000.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" style="-fx-background-color:#f5f7fa;">
>>>>>>> 5f2e0ee0f087c04a484e94f2bae0bbc96ecca90f ======= <StackPane prefHeight="785.0" prefWidth="1086.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="MainFormController"> >>>>>>> afra <children>
<!-- Profile Card --> <VBox layoutX="720.0" layoutY="25.0" prefHeight="250.0" prefWidth="230.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="10">
<children> <ImageView fitHeight="120.0" fitWidth="120.0" preserveRatio="true"/> <Label text="Student Name" textFill="WHITE"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="20.0"/> </font> </Label> <Label text="student@email.com" textFill="WHITE"/> <Label text="Course: ICT" textFill="WHITE"/> <Label text="Phone: 0771234567" textFill="WHITE"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Recent Notices --> <VBox layoutX="30.0" layoutY="25.0" prefHeight="250.0" prefWidth="640.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="10">
<children> <Label text="Recent Notices"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0"/> </font> </Label>
<Label text="• Semester exam timetable will be released next week"/> <Label text="• Mentor meeting on Friday at 10.00 AM"/> <Label text="• Assignment submission deadline extended to Monday"/>
<Button text="View All Notices" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Today Timetable --> <VBox layoutX="30.0" layoutY="310.0" prefHeight="260.0" prefWidth="450.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="10">
<children> <Label text="Today's Timetable"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="24.0"/> </font> </Label>
<TableView prefHeight="190.0" prefWidth="410.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="100.0" text="Time"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="110.0" text="Course Code"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="120.0" text="Course"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="80.0" text="Type"/> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Mentor Details --> <VBox layoutX="510.0" layoutY="310.0" prefHeight="125.0" prefWidth="440.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="8">
<children> <Label text="Mentor Details"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="22.0"/> </font> </Label>
<Label text="Name: Mr. John Silva"/> <Label text="Department: ICT"/> <Label text="Email: john.silva@fot.com"/> <Label text="Contact: 0712345678"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Course Timetable / Quick Access --> <VBox layoutX="510.0" layoutY="455.0" prefHeight="115.0" prefWidth="440.0" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-border-color:#d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius:12;" spacing="10">
<children> <Label text="Course Timetable & Quick Access"> <font> <Font name="System Bold" size="22.0"/> </font> </Label>
<HBox spacing="12"> <children> <<<<<<< HEAD <<<<<<< HEAD <Button mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="129.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Dashboard" prefWidth="158.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Attendance" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/attendance.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets left="3.0" right="20.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> </Button> prefWidth="181.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" text="Course" textFill="WHITE"> <graphic> <ImageView fitHeight="20" fitWidth="20"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/course.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </graphic> <font> <Font size="16.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets right="40.0" top="10.0" /> </padding></Button> </children> </VBox> </left> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="54.0" prefWidth="1132.0" spacing="10.0" style="-fx-border-color: #122c4a; -fx-background-color: #122c4a;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="10.0" right="10.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label alignment="CENTER" contentDisplay="CENTER" prefHeight="54.0" prefWidth="929.0" style="-fx-background-color: #122c4a;" text="Welcome to FOT Managment System......" textFill="WHITE" textOverrun="CENTER_ELLIPSIS"> <font> <Font name="Castellar" size="21.0" /> </font></Label> <ImageView fitHeight="64.0" fitWidth="30.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#handleProfile" prefHeight="32.0" prefWidth="72.0" style="-fx-background-color: black;" text="Edit Profile" textFill="#ccd9ea"> <padding> <Insets bottom="10.0" left="5.0" right="5.0" top="10.0" /> </padding> <font> <Font size="7.0" /> </font> </Button> </children> </HBox> </top> <center> <AnchorPane prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="200.0" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <children> <VBox layoutX="640.0" layoutY="23.0" prefHeight="350.0" prefWidth="318.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36;" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="24.0"> <children> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="351.0"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="200.0" fitWidth="119.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <viewport> <Rectangle2D /> </viewport> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="120.0" top="10.0" /> </VBox.margin> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> </children></VBox> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="351.0" /> <AnchorPane prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="200.0"> <children> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" layoutX="133.0" layoutY="-5.0" prefHeight="34.0" prefWidth="102.0" text="Name" textFill="WHITE"> <opaqueInsets> <Insets left="10.0" top="20.0" /> </opaqueInsets> <font> <Font name="Calibri" size="18.0" /> </font> <padding> <Insets left="10.0" /> </padding> </Label> </children></AnchorPane> <VBox prefHeight="200.0" prefWidth="100.0"> <children> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="abcsomething@gmail.com" textAlignment="CENTER" textFill="WHITE"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> </children></VBox> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="Course: ICT" textFill="WHITE"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> <Label contentDisplay="CENTER" text="ContactNo: 0775657777" textFill="#fff8f8"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> </children> <opaqueInsets> <Insets /> </opaqueInsets> </VBox> <VBox layoutX="29.0" layoutY="431.0" prefHeight="258.0" prefWidth="322.0"> <children> <Label text="Today's TimeTable"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="80.0" top="8.0" /> </VBox.margin> <font> <Font size="22.0" /> </font> </Label> <TableView prefHeight="193.0" prefWidth="317.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Time" /> <TableColumn minWidth="0.0" prefWidth="0.0" text="C2" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="88.79991912841797" text="Course Code" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="93.60003662109375" text="Course" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="63.20001220703125" text="Type" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <TextField floatText="\@Faculty of Technology,Universuty of ruhuna" layoutX="238.0" layoutY="689.0" maxLength="20" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="530.0" /> <VBox layoutX="54.0" layoutY="56.0" prefHeight="294.0" prefWidth="426.0"> <children> <Label text="RecentNotice"> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="10.0" top="15.0" /> </VBox.margin> </Label> <TableView prefHeight="290.0" prefWidth="326.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="103.99999237060547" text="Date" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="322.39990234375" text="Description" /> </columns> <VBox.margin> <Insets left="100.0" /> </VBox.margin> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <Button layoutX="28.0" layoutY="677.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="27.0" prefWidth="54.0" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-border-color: black;" text="View" textFill="WHITE" /> <Button layoutX="874.0" layoutY="706.0" mnemonicParsing="false" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="108.0" style="-fx-background-color: black;" text="LogOut" textFill="WHITE" /> <ImageView fitHeight="30.0" fitWidth="61.0" layoutX="844.0" layoutY="704.0" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../../icon/logout.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Text layoutX="714.0" layoutY="401.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Your Mentor Details" wrappingWidth="191.67816162109375"> <font> <Font size="19.0" /> </font> </Text> </children> </AnchorPane> </center> </BorderPane> ======= <Button text="View Full Timetable" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> <Button text="My Courses" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> <Button text="Results" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-text-fill:white;"/> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?>
<ScrollPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fitToWidth="true" style="-fx-background-color: #f5f7fa;"> <content> <VBox spacing="20" style="-fx-padding: 20; -fx-background-color: #f5f7fa;"> <children> <!-- Header Section --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;"> <children> <!-- Profile Card --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="80.0" fitWidth="80.0" preserveRatio="true"> <image> <Image url="@../../Resources/images/icon/stu.png" /> </image> </ImageView> <Label text="Student Name" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="student@email.com" textFill="#cccccc" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Label text="Course: ICT" textFill="#cccccc" style="-fx-font-size: 11;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Welcome Message --> <VBox spacing="10" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Welcome to Dashboard" style="-fx-font-size: 20; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Good day! Here's what's happening with your courses and academic progress." wrapText="true"/> </children> </VBox>
<Button text="Edit Profile" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 10 20 10 20;"/> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Quick Stats Row --> <HBox spacing="15"> <children> <!-- Attendance --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #3498db; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Attendance" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="85%" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- GPA --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #2ecc71; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Current GPA" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="3.75" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Courses --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #f39c12; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Registered Courses" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="6" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Assignments --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 15;" spacing="8" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Due Assignments" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="3" textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Content Row 1: Notices and Timetable --> <HBox spacing="15"> <children> <!-- Recent Notices --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="12" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Recent Notices" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <Label text="• Semester exam timetable will be released next week" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Label text="• Mentor meeting on Friday at 10.00 AM" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Label text="• Assignment submission deadline extended to Monday" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Label text="• New course materials uploaded in Learning Portal" wrapText="true" style="-fx-font-size: 12;"/> <Button text="View All Notices" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 15 8 15;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Today's Timetable --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="12" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Today's Timetable" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <TableView prefHeight="120.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="80.0" text="Time"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="100.0" text="Course Code"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="130.0" text="Course Name"/> <TableColumn prefWidth="70.0" text="Type"/> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Content Row 2: Mentor and Quick Access --> <HBox spacing="15"> <children> <!-- Mentor Details --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="10" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Mentor Details" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <Label text="Dr. John Silva" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Department: ICT"/> <Label text="Email: john.silva@fot.com"/> <Label text="Phone: 0712345678"/> <Label text="Office Hours: Mon-Fri, 2:00-4:00 PM" style="-fx-text-fill: #666666;"/> <Button text="Schedule Meeting" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 15 8 15; -fx-margin-top: 10;"/> </children> </VBox>
<!-- Quick Access Buttons --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 20;" spacing="15" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <Label text="Quick Access" style="-fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-font-size: 16;"/> <HBox spacing="10"> <children> <Button text="Attendance" style="-fx-background-color: #2ecc71; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Button text="Notice" style="-fx-background-color: #3498db; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Button text="Grades" style="-fx-background-color: #f39c12; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> </children> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10"> <children> <Button text="Medical" style="-fx-background-color: #e74c3c; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> <Button text="Timetable" style="-fx-background-color: #9b59b6; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-padding: 8 12 8 12; -fx-font-size: 11;"/> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox>
</children> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import com.gluonhq.charm.glisten.control.Icon?> <?import com.gluonhq.charm.glisten.control.ToggleButtonGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Text?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="569.0" prefWidth="685.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="CONTROLLER_NAME"> <children> <Text fill="#0b1f36" layoutX="22.0" layoutY="41.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Grades"> <font> <Font size="25.0" /> </font> </Text> <Text layoutX="33.0" layoutY="76.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Subject:-" wrappingWidth="72.0120849609375" /> <ComboBox layoutX="82.0" layoutY="59.0" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="123.0" promptText="All" /> <Text layoutX="226.0" layoutY="77.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Grade:-" /> <ComboBox layoutX="265.0" layoutY="60.0" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="99.0" promptText="CA grades" /> <ToggleButtonGroup layoutX="384.0" layoutY="61.0" selectionType="SINGLE"> <toggles> <ToggleButton text="individual"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_LEFT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> <ToggleButton text="batch"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_RIGHT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> </toggles> </ToggleButtonGroup> <TableView layoutX="33.0" layoutY="100.0" prefHeight="163.0" prefWidth="223.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="88.79998779296875" text="Course Code" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="61.60003662109375" text="Credit" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Grades" /> </columns> </TableView> <Text fill="#0b1f36" layoutX="38.0" layoutY="301.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="GPA"> <font> <Font size="25.0" /> </font> </Text> <ToggleButtonGroup layoutX="42.0" layoutY="307.0" selectionType="SINGLE" /> <ToggleButton layoutX="44.0" layoutY="320.0" text="indivitual"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_LEFT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> <ToggleButton layoutX="120.0" layoutY="320.0" text="batch"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_RIGHT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> <TableView layoutX="45.0" layoutY="356.0" prefHeight="180.0" prefWidth="298.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Reg_no" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Course" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="SGPA" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="CGPA" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import com.gluonhq.charm.glisten.control.Icon?> <?import com.gluonhq.charm.glisten.control.ToggleButtonGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Font?> <?import javafx.scene.text.Text?>
<AnchorPane prefHeight="569.0" prefWidth="685.0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Student.stuGradesController"> <children> <Text fill="#0b1f36" layoutX="22.0" layoutY="41.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Grades"> <font> <Font size="25.0" /> </font> </Text> <Text layoutX="33.0" layoutY="76.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Subject:-" wrappingWidth="72.0120849609375" /> <ComboBox layoutX="82.0" layoutY="59.0" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="123.0" promptText="All" /> <Text layoutX="226.0" layoutY="77.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="Grade:-" /> <ComboBox layoutX="265.0" layoutY="60.0" prefHeight="26.0" prefWidth="99.0" promptText="CA grades" /> <ToggleButtonGroup layoutX="384.0" layoutY="61.0" selectionType="SINGLE"> <toggles> <ToggleButton text="individual"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_LEFT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> <ToggleButton text="batch"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_RIGHT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> </toggles> </ToggleButtonGroup> <TableView layoutX="33.0" layoutY="100.0" prefHeight="163.0" prefWidth="223.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="88.79998779296875" text="Course Code" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="61.60003662109375" text="Credit" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Grades" /> </columns> </TableView> <Text fill="#0b1f36" layoutX="38.0" layoutY="301.0" strokeType="OUTSIDE" strokeWidth="0.0" text="GPA"> <font> <Font size="25.0" /> </font> </Text> <ToggleButtonGroup layoutX="42.0" layoutY="307.0" selectionType="SINGLE" /> <ToggleButton layoutX="44.0" layoutY="320.0" text="indivitual"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_LEFT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> <ToggleButton layoutX="120.0" layoutY="320.0" text="batch"> <graphic> <Icon content="FORMAT_ALIGN_RIGHT" /> </graphic> </ToggleButton> <TableView layoutX="45.0" layoutY="356.0" prefHeight="180.0" prefWidth="298.0"> <columns> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Reg_no" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="Course" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="SGPA" /> <TableColumn prefWidth="75.0" text="CGPA" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DatePicker?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Student.stuMedicalController">
<content> <VBox spacing="18" style="-fx-padding: 22; -fx-background-color: #f5f7fa;">
<HBox spacing="12" style="-fx-alignment: center-left;"> <Label text="Medical Submissions" style="-fx-font-size: 22px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #0b1f36;" />
<Button text="+ Add Medical" onAction="#handleShowAddMedical" style="-fx-background-color: #0b5ed7; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 8 14 8 14;" /> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="addMedicalBox" spacing="12" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 12;">
<Label text="Add New Medical" style="-fx-font-size: 17px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #0b1f36;" />
<HBox spacing="10"> <DatePicker fx:id="startDatePicker" promptText="Start Date" /> <DatePicker fx:id="endDatePicker" promptText="End Date" />
<Button text="Load Sessions" onAction="#handleLoadSessions" style="-fx-background-color: #198754; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 7;" /> </HBox>
<TextArea fx:id="reasonArea" promptText="Reason for medical" prefRowCount="3" wrapText="true" />
<HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-alignment: center-left;"> <Button text="Upload Medical Photo" onAction="#handleChooseFile" style="-fx-background-color: #6c757d; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 7;" />
<Label fx:id="fileLabel" text="No file selected" wrapText="true" /> </HBox>
<Label text="Select affected attendance sessions:" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;" />
<TableView fx:id="sessionTable" prefHeight="250" editable="true"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="selectColumn" text="Select" prefWidth="70" /> <TableColumn fx:id="dateColumn" text="Date" prefWidth="120" /> <TableColumn fx:id="courseColumn" text="Course ID" prefWidth="130" /> <TableColumn fx:id="sessionColumn" text="Session" prefWidth="260" /> <TableColumn fx:id="typeColumn" text="Type" prefWidth="120" /> </columns> </TableView>
<Button text="Submit Medical" onAction="#handleSubmitMedical" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 8 16 8 16;" />
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" textFill="red" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="medicalCardBox" spacing="12" />
</VBox> </content> </ScrollPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.DatePicker?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.techOfficerControllers.TOMedicalController">
<content> <VBox spacing="18" style="-fx-padding: 22; -fx-background-color: #f5f7fa;">
<HBox spacing="12" style="-fx-alignment: center-left;"> <Label text="Medical Submissions" style="-fx-font-size: 22px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #0b1f36;" />
<Button text="+ Add Medical" onAction="#handleShowAddMedical" style="-fx-background-color: #0b5ed7; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 8 14 8 14;" /> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="addMedicalBox" spacing="12" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-padding: 18; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-border-color: #d9e2ec; -fx-border-radius: 12;">
<Label text="Add New Medical" style="-fx-font-size: 17px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #0b1f36;" />
<HBox spacing="10"> <DatePicker fx:id="startDatePicker" promptText="Start Date" /> <DatePicker fx:id="endDatePicker" promptText="End Date" />
<Button text="Load Sessions" onAction="#handleLoadSessions" style="-fx-background-color: #198754; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 7;" /> </HBox>
<TextArea fx:id="reasonArea" promptText="Reason for medical" prefRowCount="3" wrapText="true" />
<HBox spacing="10" style="-fx-alignment: center-left;"> <Button text="Upload Medical Photo" onAction="#handleChooseFile" style="-fx-background-color: #6c757d; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 7;" />
<Label fx:id="fileLabel" text="No file selected" wrapText="true" /> </HBox>
<Label text="Select affected attendance sessions:" style="-fx-font-weight: bold;" />
<TableView fx:id="sessionTable" prefHeight="250" editable="true"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="selectColumn" text="Select" prefWidth="70" /> <TableColumn fx:id="dateColumn" text="Date" prefWidth="120" /> <TableColumn fx:id="courseColumn" text="Course ID" prefWidth="130" /> <TableColumn fx:id="sessionColumn" text="Session" prefWidth="260" /> <TableColumn fx:id="typeColumn" text="Type" prefWidth="120" /> </columns> </TableView>
<Button text="Submit Medical" onAction="#handleSubmitMedical" style="-fx-background-color: #0b1f36; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-padding: 8 16 8 16;" />
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" textFill="red" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<VBox fx:id="medicalCardBox" spacing="12" />
</VBox> </content> </ScrollPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.Student.stuNoticeController" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;">
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="50" spacing="12" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-padding:10 20 10 20;"> <children> <Label text="My Notices " textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold;" />
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<TextField fx:id="searchField" prefWidth="280" promptText="Search notice..." />
<Button text="" onAction="#handleSearch" style="-fx-background-color:#122c4a; -fx-text-fill:white;" /> </children> </HBox>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" pannable="true" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;"> <content> <VBox fx:id="noticeCardBox" spacing="18" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;"> <padding> <Insets top="20" right="20" bottom="20" left="20" /> </padding> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane>
</VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="0" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.controller.techOfficerControllers.TONoticeController" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;">
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="50" spacing="12" style="-fx-background-color:#0b1f36; -fx-padding:10 20 10 20;"> <children> <Label text="My Notices " textFill="WHITE" style="-fx-font-size:18px; -fx-font-weight:bold;" />
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<TextField fx:id="searchField" prefWidth="280" promptText="Search notice..." />
<Button text="" onAction="#handleSearch" style="-fx-background-color:#122c4a; -fx-text-fill:white;" /> </children> </HBox>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" pannable="true" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;"> <content> <VBox fx:id="noticeCardBox" spacing="18" style="-fx-background-color:#eaf1f8;"> <padding> <Insets top="20" right="20" bottom="20" left="20" /> </padding> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane>
</VBox>
